items.title: Payout incident review loop
items.name: Payout incident review loop
items.summary: Continuous review of payout failures, delays, and operational regressions affecting platforms and merchants.
items.decisionToMake: Decide where reliability hardening is needed before incidents breach KTLO thresholds.
